info.name: Azure DevOps Releases API
info.description:
REST API for managing release definitions and deployments in Azure Pipelines. Provides programmatic control over continuous delivery pipelines, including creating and managing release definitions, triggering releases, managing deployment approvals, and tracking deployment status across environments.


Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure DevOps

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
Expand additional release details

item.name: Azure DevOps Update a release definition

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

variable.description: (Required) Numeric ID of the release definition to update

request.description: Replaces an existing release definition with the provided definition. The revision number in the body must match the current revision to prevent concurrent modification conflicts.

response.name: Release definition updated successfully

item.name: Azure DevOps Delete a release definition

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
Comment explaining why the definition is being deleted
Force delete even if there are associated releases

variable.description: (Required) Numeric ID of the release definition to delete

request.description: Deletes a release definition. All associated releases must be deleted or abandoned first. This operation cannot be undone.

response.name: Release definition deleted successfully

item.name: Azure DevOps Create a release definition

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

request.description: Creates a new release definition specifying environments, artifacts, triggers, variables, and deployment steps. The definition serves as the template for future release instances.

response.name: Release definition created successfully
